topics: QK routing vs OV content (mechanistic basis for K > V)
CoT unfaithfulness in reasoning models (Anthropic, OpenAI, consensus)
Latent reasoning and text bottleneck (surveys, gradient bottleneck)
KV memories and interpretability (NeurIPS 2025, sparse attention)
key_finding: K > V has principled mechanistic explanation: QK=routing, OV=content (Transformer Circuits 2025). Text = lossy projection is ARCHITECTURALLY GUARANTEED: 95-99% of gradient norm suppressed at LM head (Godey & Artzi, March 2026). CoT unfaithfulness confirmed by Anthropic (<20% verbalization) and OpenAI (obfuscated reward hacking). Latent reasoning is mainstream: 2 surveys with 30+ authors each.
evidence_impact: Three new decisive literature findings: (1) Mechanistic grounding of K>V via QK/OV framework, (2) Architectural proof of text as lossy projection via gradient bottleneck, (3) Behavioral confirmation of hidden computation by Anthropic and OpenAI. Our work provides the unique mechanistic substrate (KV cache) connecting these independent findings.
next_planned: Priority: (1) K-only PGD on Qwen to connect null space and K>V findings. (2) Third model family (Mistral/Phi) for K-V replication. (3) Qwen-Instruct position × K-V to separate base/instruct effect. (4) Evidence consolidation — narrative synthesis. (5) Sparse attention analysis overlap with AC positions.

null_space_existence.status: strong (Qwen PGD-validated). K-routing is the mechanistic pathway

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal. Explained by attention sinks (infrastructure) at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation CROSS-MODEL REPLICATED. Now MECHANISTICALLY GROUNDED via QK/OV framework

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention (0.3% edges) explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for K>V (2 families × 3 positions). Need 3rd family

superadditive_interaction.status: Llama-specific (7.9-16.8x). Weak on Qwen. Routing+throughput cascade

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck (95-99%). Anthropic/OpenAI confirm unfaithfulness. 2 latent reasoning surveys. Our K>V finding is NOVEL causal evidence
